title: Amber Jasmine Silk | Warm Floral Candle | Luxury Amber Jasmine Scented Candle | Mood Uplifting Aromatherapy Candle | Natural Soy Wax | Glass Jar | Wooden Lid | Elegant Gift Candle | Lissi Aroma London
features: PREMIUM MATERIALS: Handcrafted with 100% natural soy wax and pure essential oils, housed in an elegant clear glass jar with a beautifully crafted wooden lid
LONG-LASTING FRAGRANCE: Amber and Jasmine scent creates a luxurious atmosphere with rich, fruity notes that fill your space with warmth
EXTENDED BURN TIME: Impressive 80-hour burn time ensures long-lasting enjoyment of this premium candle's delightful aroma
ELEGANT DESIGN: Clear glass container with wooden lid complement any décor, making it perfect for both home use and gifting
GENEROUS SIZE: 320g candle provides ample burning time while maintaining a sophisticated presence in any room
description: Product description Amber Jasmine Silk – Luxury Soy Wax Candle by Lissi Aroma London Immerse your home in the elegant warmth of Amber Jasmine Silk, a refined scented candle from Lissi Aroma London. This beautifully balanced fragrance blends the richness of golden amber with the delicate floral notes of jasmine, creating a soft, smooth aroma that feels both luxurious and calming. Carefully hand-poured using natural soy wax, this candle offers a clean, even burn while gently filling your space with its sophisticated scent. The candle is presented in a premium glass jar and finished with a natural wooden lid, combining modern simplicity with timeless design. Perfect for creating a relaxing atmosphere after a long day, Amber Jasmine Silk transforms any room into a warm and inviting sanctuary. Its elegant appearance and luxurious fragrance also make it a thoughtful gift for birthdays, celebrations, or special occasions. Product Details Fragrance: Amber Jasmine Silk Wax: Natural Soy Wax Weight: 320g Burn: Clean and long-lasting Jar: Premium glass with wooden lid Brand: Lissi Aroma London Discover the beauty of refined home fragrance with Lissi Aroma Amber Jasmine Silk, where warm amber and delicate jasmine come together in perfect harmony. Safety Warning Always trim the wick before each use. Keep the candle in a cool, dry place. Never leave a burning candle unattended. Burn for no more than 4 hours at a time.
